family_focus: Turn a natural-language visual brief into a saved image artifact.
task_shape: Single creative brief to single exported asset.
selection_reason: Kept as the only clearly usable multimodal design reference in the provided sources. It is simple, but still captures prompt-to-asset translation.
difficulty_levers: need to preserve all requested scene elements
constraints: save the generated image using the requested filename
notes: Useful as a lightweight design seed, but still far thinner than a full web or slide layout task.

variants.summary: Generate one image from a natural-language scene brief and save it to disk.
